title: Parsing JSON with dart:convert
description: Converting JSON strings to Dart objects.

slides.title: JSON Parsing 📄
slides.content:
# Working with JSON

`dart:convert` provides `jsonDecode` to parse JSON strings into Dart objects (Map, List).

* `jsonDecode(String json)` – returns dynamic (usually Map<String, dynamic>).
* Create model classes with `fromJson` factory constructors.
* Use `jsonEncode` to convert objects back to JSON.

quizData.question: What does jsonDecode return for a JSON object?
quizData.explanation: jsonDecode returns a Map for JSON objects, a List for JSON arrays.

slides.title: Model Class with fromJson
slides.content: Define a `Post` class to hold data:

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use code generation for large models

For complex JSON, consider packages like `json_serializable` to automate fromJson/toJson.
